titleStmt.title: SII 27.33: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 33. (A.R. No. 315 of 1937-38.) GŌRAṆṬLA, KURNOOL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Śiva temple.
This damaged record is dated Śaka 1137, Yuva, Māgha, śu. 5, Thursday. The tithi corresponds to 1216 A.D., January 25 when the weekday was Monday and not Thursday.

It refers to the construction of a temple (name not clear) at Gōraṭa and consecration of the deity therein in the name of his father, by mahāpradhāna, sarvvādhikāri Savadhare Yindapa-nāyaka who also made certain endowments for worship and offerings to the deity and repairs to the temple. The donor is said to be governing Naḻavāḍi which he obtained from mahāpasāyita, samasta-sēnādhipati Lakshmīdēvadaṇḍanāyaka. It refers to Pālajiyya to whom probably the gift was entrusted.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī Ōṁ . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁ
dra cāmara cāravē . trailōkya naga
rāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāya
ṇa pratāpa cakravartti siṁgaḷadēvarā
mahitaḻa paṁ
bhujabaḷa saṁkathā vinōda
diṁ rājyaṁ geyyuttu tatprasādōpajīvita
nuṁ mahāpasāyitaṁ samasta sēnā
dhipati bāhattara niyōgādhipati saka
ḻa lakṣmīpati paścimarāya bhōjadēva di
śā paṭṭa daṁḍḍa [.] nāyaka nārāyaṇa laSome space appears to have been left blank here.
kṣmīdēva daṁḍanāyakaru taṁnayēkaika vikra
mabhujāvaṣṭaṁbhadiṁ palavu dēśaṁgaḷa
mutti yāḷvuttamiralātana kayyalu sama
sta rājyabhāra nirūpita [.] sahāmātya
pada virājamāna mānōnnata prabhu
maṁtrōtsāha śaktitrayaguṇasaṁpanna
nuḍidu mattenayāḷu muṁniṟivamaṟiThedu is engraved above the line.
vugekāva nanmakuṁdayaṇuga raṇaraṁga
śūdraka nennida mahāpradhānaṁ sarvā
dhikāri savadhare yiṁdapanāyakanu naḻa
vāḍiyaṁ haḍidu rājyasthiranāgirdu
svasti śrī sakavaruṣa 1137 neya yu
va saṁvatsarada māgha śu 5 guruvāradaṁ
du gōraṭayalu taṁma taṁdeya pesaralu
nnēśvaradēvaraṁ pratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍi dhūpa
dīpa nivēdyakkeṁdu jīrnnōddhārakkeyāgi
hā maṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ cāḷukyānvayanennida
varsa ruṁ biṭṭukoṁḍu pālajiyya
toḷadu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍikoṭṭa dha
ṭhamūḍalu 10 dūra kara
nālkane
kiḍsinaraka .
yō harēti vasuṁdhara na
sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ
krimi . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 27.33 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
